creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 2009-09-14 at 11:05 +0700, toidin desi wrote:

> I have problem whith my server can't detekted PCI-Express Broadcom
> bcm5709C By OS FreeBSd Version 6.3/64 in server IBM X3550 M2. 
> Please help to solve this problem 

Hi,

I have found the changes that were made to get these cards (0x163914e4)
to work under FreeBSD 7.x, however the changes are large and it is not
easy to back port them to RELENG_6.  This card will work under FreeBSD
7.1 or later.

Is there a reason why you are unable to use FreeBSD 7.2 on your server?

Gavin
